## 2026-05-11 - Added keyboard focus to file upload controls
**Learning:** File upload drag-and-drop zones and file removal buttons generated by React components in this app lacked explicit keyboard focus indicators (focus-visible classes), creating a confusing experience for keyboard users trying to submit documents.
**Action:** Always ensure that any interactive element, especially custom divs and dynamically generated utility buttons, have explicit focus-visible styles to ensure full keyboard navigation support.

## 2026-05-30 - Added focus styles directly to global utility buttons
**Learning:** Buttons using utility classes like `.ui-btn-primary` often lacked keyboard focus visibility because the classes themselves did not include them, forcing developers to remember to add `focus-visible` on every instance. This resulted in missed focus states on several buttons (e.g., in the navbar).
**Action:** Add focus visibility states (e.g., `focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-blue-500 focus-visible:ring-offset-2`) directly into the global utility class definition (like in `globals.css`) to ensure accessibility is baked in and automatically applied everywhere.
